verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Hallelujah, He redeemed me, I am born again to win, I thank God He justified me Of His fullness have we all received of Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm a new creation, I'm a brand new man. Old things are passed away, I've been born again. More than a conqueror That's who I am, I'm a new creation I'm a brand new man!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've Received the Christ of Calva'ry I have no sense of Sin We have a oneness and a Fellwship Delivered from Authority of Sin

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God has Wrought for Me Redemption One that Covers Every Need Perfectly He's Restored Our Fellowship With no sense of Guilt or Memory

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Born again - There's really been a change in me! Born again, just like Jesus said. Born again - and all because of Calvary, I'm glad, so glad That I've been born again.
